behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the relevant file paths (config/allconfig/alldecoders.go, hugolib/disableKinds_test.go) and the test TestDisableKindsEmptySliceAncestors that tests reference.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to filter (empty keys/values) but doesn't specify the exact code change or line.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_taxonomies_decoder_has_filtering asserts literal strings 'if k == "" || v == ""' and 'delete(m, k)' in alldecoders.go, which would fail for valid alternative fixes (e.g., using different variable names, using a filter helper, or filtering earlier in the pipeline).

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Most tests run go build/test/vet subprocesses and execute Hugo builds; only one test is text-based.

test_not_tautological.reason: F2P tests actually build a Hugo site with the problematic config and would timeout if the infinite loop bug persists.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover the hang behavior, compilation, and taxonomy tests as required.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have descriptive names and docstrings explaining F2P/P2P roles.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points to the general area (config/allconfig/alldecoders.go) which is reasonable hint, not leaking exact line.
